dialogos.texto_en: I see.\nSo Futaro-kun wanted to kiss Miku, huh?\nHe was that much of a wolf, was he.
He's not a wolf, you know.\nAt best, he's just a dog.
*sigh*\nHearing it like this, it's clear that both of them\nare struggling with their feelings for each other.
This...is just the difficulty of 'love', isn't it?
Well, I can understand both\nMiku and Fu-kun's feelings.
Both Miku and Uesugi-san cherish each other,\nthat's why they're struggling like this.
When something is important to you,\nyou become easily frightened.\nI guess that's just how it is for those two.
But still, it seems like there's not much\nfor us to do at this point, is there?
Yeah. What they need now\nis to confirm their feelings for each other.
Of course, they'll have to do that on their own.
Definitely.\nI don't intend to meddle too much in their affairs.
Well, maybe we can subtly help them out a little bit?
Yotsuba.\nDon't be too nosy, okay?
But I'm just worried.\nUesugi-san has already failed once before.
I hope he learned from his mistakes this time.
Maybe...\nwe should prepare a trump card, just in case?
...I have a bad feeling about this.
Actually, when I went to the lounge earlier,\nI heard something interesting.
Um, I was checking on my phone%p-2;――
Here, here! Look!
Tomorrow, we're planning to go to Kokusai dori\nand then to the beach.\nIt might come in handy if something happens.
...I see.\nThis could be useful, couldn't it?
Huh?\nA-are you serious?
Well, don't you think it's easier for those two\nif we make it a little more obvious?
But, is that really a good idea...?
Well, it's just a trump card, after all.
Okay, then let's keep it a secret from\nMiku and Futaro-kun until the last minute.
Yeah...
Let's hope we don't have to use it, though.
